inline: The compiled ContractRuntime guide is authoritative for contract_add next legal action ordering.
Only the thin contract_add start/read/submit-line facade is agent-facing; generic CRUD remains internal.
Observer owns request, approval/adoption, and close-ready lines only.
mf_sub owns draft precheck, source write or read-only adoption proof, runtime visibility proof, and asset-binding proposal or waiver evidence.
QA owns independent verification and must not be authored by observer or mf_sub.
Asset binding evidence must be proposal/review/materialize or an explicit follow-up/waiver; direct trusted graph DB writes are not contract_add evidence.

stages.description: Observer requests a source-backed contract addition and binds route, backlog, scope, target source path, and role plan.

lines.description: Observer-authored request with backlog id, route identity, source path, target roles, owned files, and acceptance criteria.

stages.description: The bounded worker validates draft contract shape before source write or read-only adoption.

lines.description: Worker-authored precheck showing schema validation, role-bound lines, lifecycle decision, and duplicate/revision expectation.

stages.description: The worker either writes a new source-backed contract or proves read-only adoption of an existing source definition.

lines.description: Worker-authored source write proof or read-only adoption proof with alias, source path, raw sha256, definition_hash, file count, and duplicate-create rejection.

stages.description: The worker proves the contract is visible through the runtime guide/current-state path.

lines.description: Worker-authored ContractRuntime visibility proof for start/read/current-state/next action ordering using submit_line_write.

stages.description: The worker records how source assets are bound or explicitly waived without direct graph DB writes.

lines.description: Worker-authored asset-binding proposal/review/materialize evidence, follow-up backlog evidence, or explicit waiver for unbound source assets.

stages.description: Independent QA verifies the source definition, runtime path, role gates, duplicate rejection, and asset-binding evidence.

lines.description: QA-authored independent verification; observer and mf_sub writes are rejected for this line.

stages.description: Observer accepts the verified contract addition and records close-ready handoff evidence.

lines.description: Observer acceptance after QA verification, including merge/reconcile/backlog close policy and any waivers or follow-ups.
Observer close-ready evidence for the contract_add execution after acceptance.

entrypoint_policy.denied_reason: contract_add must be reached through an approved successor flow, not as a root entrypoint

successors.reason: Run stricter QA evidence review if contract_add verification finds ambiguous evidence.
Use a bounded observer hotfix only for tiny runtime/facade repairs found while executing contract_add.
